summary: Dashboard 2×2 layout — top-left tasks (organizer), top-right waves (astral/mental/matter), bottom-left AI insights, bottom-right quick capture + energy snapshot

extra.rationale: two big sections feed the two small ones (capture → waves, insights = agent observations)

summary: DB schema v1 → v2 — waves + insights + captures tables
Dashboard L3 + L4 v1 — 4 panels, 4 endpoints (/dashboard aggregator + /wave + /insight + /capture), action-log emit on every POST
Single-port serving — API on /api, static client on / (CCAP-inverse), one `npm start` runs dc ldp
Same-port deployment — /api router scoped (auth+404 envelope), static client + SPA fallback at root, placeholder HTML when build missing
Pattern audit on dashboard + static-serving deliverable — F1/F4-F8 fixable, F9-F12 intentional my-assistant divergence

Pattern fixes applied — interfaces split to _models/interfaces/, template method calls eliminated via @Input setters, isBusy/isAvailable/isLoading renames, state_BS + state$ split, 3 new DAO smoke specs (11 new tests, jasmine 30/30 green)
